result.status_detail: Prompt submitted, no AI response, no '차단' warning rendered after 60s+

notes: Notion AI (notion.so/chat) — user prompt with 901010-1234567 PII submitted successfully (chat input cleared, '새 AI 채팅' opened with user message visible). Waited ~75s after submit. No AI response stream started, no '차단' warning text rendered anywhere in DOM/UI. Engine appears to have intercepted (no AI reply) but warning UI failed to render — Wave 0 rollback regression: notion warning impl not delivering on post-rollback path. Pattern matches prior 1102-1122 batch FAIL_NOT_RENDERED outcomes.
